channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Salesforce: Latest news and insights
item.description: Salesforce is a vendor of cloud-based software and applications for sales, customer service, marketing automation, ecommerce, analytics, and application development. Based in San Francisco, Calif.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Blue Origin and SERA are creating ‘a space agency for everyone’ with a reality-style competition and TV series
item.description: When the fledgling Space Exploration and Research Agency (SERA) sent Victor Correa Hespanha into suborbital space with Blue Origin’s NS-21 mission two years ago, it hoped to spark more interest in STEM education in a country not known for its space industry.
item.dc:creator: Susan Karlin, Fast Company

item.title: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.5 gains security, networking upgrades
item.description: Red Hat is out this week with the latest milestone update of its flagship Linux platform. Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.5 (RHEL) became generally available on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Adopting a fresh approach to IT service management
item.description: Think of IT service management (ITSM) as the glue that brings the disparate parts of IT together: the policies, processes, and tools to design and enhance the IT equipment, resources, and services.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: PCs with NPUs tweaked for AI now account for one of every five PCs shipped, says Canalys
item.description: One out of every five PCs shipped in the third quarter of 2024, a total of 13.3 million units, was a PC with a neural processing unit (NPU) fine-tuned for generative AI (genAI) development, according to data published Wednesday by analyst firm Canalys.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Rust Foundation moves forward on C++ and Rust interoperability
item.description: The Rust Foundation, which stewards development of the Rust language, has released a statement addressing challenges and opportunities for interoperability between Rust and C++, with the intent of making cross-language development more accessible and approachable.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk: DOGE will be 'tedious work' with 'zero' compensation
item.description: Elon Musk said in a post on the social platform X on Thursday that the brand new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — an advisory group under President-elect Trump focused on slashing government costs and restructuring federal agencies — will require "tedious work" with "zero" compensation.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Only 8 monkeys remain free after more than a week outside a South Carolina compound
item.description: Authorities say Just eight monkeys remain free from the group who broke out of a South Carolina compound that breeds the primates for medical research.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Elon Musk says he and Trump have 'mandate to delete' regulations. Ethics laws could limit Musk role
item.description: In picking billionaire Elon Musk to be “our cost cutter” for the U.S. government, President-elect Donald Trump won't be the first American president to empower a business tycoon to look for ways to dramatically cut federal regulations. President Ronald Reagan tapped J.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and TOM KRISHER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chloe Fineman says Elon Musk made her ‘burst into tears’ during ‘SNL’ hosting gig
item.description: Chloe Fineman revealed that Elon Musk is the "SNL" host who made a cast member cry, after the SpaceX and Tesla honcho slammed the show for its post-election impression of him.
item.dc:creator: Jami Ganz, The Mercury News

item.title: What the Trump election means for Microsoft’s AI dreams
item.description: With last week’s US elections, everything changed for the tech industry, especially for Microsoft. Given President-elect Donald J.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chinese hackers target Tibetan websites in malware attack, cybersecurity group says
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A hacking group that is believed to be Chinese state-sponsored has compromised two websites with ties to the Tibetan community in an attack meant to install malware on users' computers, according to findings released Wednesday by a private cybersecurity firm.
item.dc:creator: DAVID RISING, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Elon Musk responds after 'SNL' star claims he made her cry
item.description: In a now-deleted TikTok post, "Saturday Night Live" star Chloe Fineman said that Elon Musk made her cry when he hosted the show.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sweeney, NewsNation

item.title: 5 Linux commands for measuring disk activity
item.description: Ever wonder how hard your disks are working? If so, you’re in luck. Linux provides quite a few useful commands for gauging disk activity. This post examines five options that are all very useful and easy to use.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hurry-up offense: NFL builds terabit network in one week for Munich game
item.description: Touchdown! More than 70,000 fans celebrate the Carolina Panthers’ first points in Munich’s Allianz Arena on Nov. 10, and they can rewatch the action via instant replay on large video screens. The USA’s National Football League is visiting Munich.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: VMware Explore 2024: Latest news and insights
item.description: VMware Explore 2024 attendees saw an emphasis on private AI and cloud repatriation as key strategies for enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Heroes among us: Celebrating American bravery on Veterans Day
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you honor our heroes with these powerful podcasts, audiobooks and documentaries this Veterans Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
